headline: Did Hertz’s New Oro Mobility Partnership with Uber Just Shift Hertz Global Holdings' (HTZ) Investment Narrative?
summary: In early May 2026, Hertz Global Holdings reported first-quarter revenue of US$2,004 million, up from US$1,813 million a year earlier, with its net loss narrowing to US$333 million and loss per share improving to US$1.06. Aeroplan, eBay, Uber, and The Home Depot each announced new collaborations with Hertz, highlighting the company’s push into partnerships, digital retail, and broader mobility services beyond its core rental operations. We’ll now examine how Hertz’s launch of Oro Mobility...
